name: Early Bird Buttermilk Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Milk for thinning as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder.
2. Beat together the buttermilk, milk, beaten egg, and oil in a bowl until well mixed. A few small lumps are okay; they will cook out.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined. If necessary, thin the batter with milk (not buttermilk) for easier pouring.
4. Heat a lightly oiled pan over medium heat until hot enough that a sprinkling of water dances around it without just sitting and sizzling.
5. Pour about 1/8 cup of batter into the hot pan.
6. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and the bottom is golden brown, then flip the pancake and cook for an additional minute or two on the other side.
7. Repeat with remaining batter. This recipe makes 15 (4-inch) pancakes.
